Welcome to Trainer MAX

Your comprehensive suite for IADC WellSharp test preparation and real-time operational diagnostics. Follow this guide to maximize your study sessions.

1. The Dashboard

Configure your targeted exam prep by selecting specific modules (e.g., MPD, Kill Methods). Choose between timed Exam Prep Mode or instant-feedback Refresher Mode.

2. Training Studio

The core testing arena. Navigate seamlessly using the side panel, flag uncertain answers for review, and submit when ready. Mobile users can access the drawer menu via the top-left button.

3. Instructor Override System

Are you a trainer? The system auto-parsed your PDF, but if an answer key is incorrect, securely log in via the Dashboard. You can manually adjust and lock in Verified Model Answers directly in the Studio.

4. Instructor Exam Sharing

Instructor Mode can create category-based trainee exam links, store packages in Firestore, and receive live trainee records grouped by crew or training batch.

Instructor Override System

The PDF's yellow-highlighted answers have been verified and locked into the platform key. If you intentionally need to change a model answer, use the secure Instructor Mode to create a local override.

Trainee Exam Link

Checking Firestore
Firestore is now the live backend. The generated trainee link uses ?examId=SESSION and reads the exam package from Firestore, so it can be opened from mobile/computer after the platform is hosted online.
Hosting note: To share with attendees, deploy this HTML file to Firebase Hosting or any HTTPS web host, then enter that public URL above. A local file path cannot be opened by trainees on other devices.

Instructor Records

What “Export Local Changes” means

It downloads only instructor-side changes saved in this browser: newly added questions, edits/overrides, hidden questions, and corrected answer keys. Use it as a backup or to move your custom bank to another computer.

What “Export Full Active Bank” means

It downloads the full currently active question bank after local edits and removals. This is useful for audit, archive, or future migration.

Sharing exams and receiving records

The generated link contains the exam selection and timer. Trainees can open it on mobile or computer after the HTML platform is hosted or shared. For instructor live records from remote devices, configure a secure backend/collector endpoint. Without a backend, results remain on the trainee’s device and can be downloaded/imported manually.

Audience Registration

Secure trainee exam access

WellSharp Exam Cover Page

This link opens trainee access only. The instructor platform, answer key, question bank, and records tools are hidden.

Shared Exam
Group: -
Before you start
Confirm your name and group. Once started, the timer runs continuously. Do not refresh, close, or change browser tabs unless instructed by the examiner.

Trainee data entry

Complete the cover page, read the rules, then start the exam. Required fields are marked with *.

Exam rules and declaration
  • The exam is timed. Submit before the timer ends.
  • Answer every question you can. Unanswered questions are recorded as open.
  • No external assistance, screenshots, copying, or answer sharing unless the instructor explicitly allows it.
  • The submitted record will include your personal data, selected answers, score, category gaps, time, group, and session ID.
  • For stable results, keep the same browser window open until the final submission confirmation appears.

If loading takes more than a few seconds, ask the instructor to regenerate the link from the latest platform version and confirm the GitHub page URL is correct.
